title: Permafrost Rising
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A permafrost-core research team in Siberia extracts a viable 40,000-year-old bacterium that consumes plastic and excretes crude oil, triggering a global resource war that the microbe was deliberately buried to prevent.
long_description: A permafrost-core research team in Siberia extracts a viable 40,000-year-old bacterium that consumes plastic and excretes crude oil, triggering a global resource war that the microbe was deliberately buried to prevent.
